title: Women 30th Birthday Banner Rose Gold Glitter Thirty & Fabulous Banner by Wonsta
features: Wonsta 30th Birthday Banner Kit Women: 1 pack glitter rose gold “Thirty & Fabulous” banner, 1 pack rose gold star string bunting, 1 roll of 5m rope

Easy Assembly: plastic needle and ribbon are including. Just hang your 30 birthday banner decorations on the walls, windows, dessert tables, gift tables, tree branches, hallway, fences and other indoor and outdoor places you like.

Glitter Thirty and Fabulous Banner: It is deluxe rose gold glitter “Thirty & Fabulous” banner. It creats deluxe rose gold 30th birthday party atmosphere. It makes your 30th birthday party so outstanding.
Perfect 30th Birthday Decorations: The glitter 30th birthday banner kit is a great gift choice for your loved 30th birthday party decorations. It can be a great decoration for women’s 30th birthday.
description: Rose Gold 30th Birthday Banner Package Includes: 1 x Glitter Thirty & Fabulous Banner 1 x Rose Gold Star String Bunting 1 x Rope Product Safety Information 1. This product containing small parts, not suitable for children under 3 years. 2. Do not put in the mouth to avoid eating. 3. This product must not be exposed to fire. 4. For use under adult supervision. Wonsta: To bright your life a little more!
